<var>
$NDPS$ = [[Splash Damage]] / Firerate
$BDPS$ = Burn Damage / Tick
$DPS$ = $NDPS$ + $BDPS$
$TP$ = $FNC-TOTALPRICE$
$CE$ = Total Price / DPS
$FNC-COST$ = 450; 350; 2450; 7500
$FNC-ROFBUG$ = Firerate
$FNC-UPGRADE$ = Bewitching Blaze; Vengeful Missiles; Queen of the Blood Ember
$FNC-UPGRADEICON$ = File:HallowPunkUpgrade1.png; File:HallowPunkUpgrade2.png; File:HallowPunkMaxUpgrade.png
$FREF$ = <ref>Firerate does not account for projectile travel time.</ref>
$DREF$ = <ref>DPS assumes only one enemy is hit and receives full splash damage, and does not account for projectile travel time.<br/>With burn, Total DPS is calculated as Normal DPS + Burn DPS, with Burn DPS being calculated as Burn Damage ÷ Tick.</ref>
</var>
<div class="overflow-box">
{| class="wikitable stats-table"
! Level !! Total Price !! [[Splash Damage]] !! Firerate$FREF$ !! Range !! Deadzone Range !! Explosion Range !! Rocket Speed !! Knockback !! Burn Damage !! Burn Duration !! Tick !! Total Elapsed Damage !! DPS$DREF$ !! Cost Efficiency
|-
| 0 || {{Money|$TP$}} || 10 || 4.5 || 18 || 7.5 || 3.5 || 35 || 10 || N/A || N/A || N/A || N/A || $NDPS$ || {{Money|$CE$}}
|-
| 1 || {{Money|$TP$}} || 18 || 4.15 || 20 || 7.5 || 3.5 || 35 || 12.5 || N/A || N/A || N/A || N/A || $NDPS$ || {{Money|$CE$}}
|-
| 2 || {{Money|$TP$}} || 52 || 4.15 || 20 || 7.5 || 5 || 40 || 12.5 || 6 || 6 || 1 || 36 || $DPS$<ref>$NDPS$ Normal DPS + $BDPS$ Burn DPS.</ref> || {{Money|$CE$}}
|-
| 3 || {{Money|$TP$}} || 180 || 4 || 21 || 7.5 || 6 || 45 || 15 || 12 || 7 || 1 || 84 || $DPS$<ref>$NDPS$ Normal DPS + $BDPS$ Burn DPS.</ref> || {{Money|$CE$}}
|}
</div>
​
